description: Alien or futuristic atmospheric conditions for sci-fi settings.
weather: A burst of stellar energy washing over everything.
No up or down, everything floating freely.
Charged particles battering shields and disrupting systems.
Synthetic sunshine from ceiling panels mimicking a sky.
Rocks from space burning bright across the sky.
A sky the wrong color with unfamiliar constellations.
Weight shifting unpredictably as gravity pulses.
The constant drone of machines keeping the air breathable.
Silent, cold emptiness with no atmosphere at all.
Two suns sinking below the horizon at once.
The artificial sky stuttering and revealing the ceiling behind it.
in the dim glow of emergency lighting
Harsh red light from backup systems casting angular shadows.
as the ship enters a nebula
Swirling clouds of cosmic gas painting the viewports.
Fine particles from space clogging filters and scouring hulls.
